phase_1.audio: Sound level monitoring shows gradual decline from 62.2 dBA to sustained 53.2 dBA. This quiet setting is favorable for sustained focus and deep work.

phase_2.holistic_assessment: Session shows moderate concentration quality with mixed environmental factors. Acoustic baseline of 53.2 dB provides acceptable conditions. User maintained variable positioning.

phase_3.recommendations: Current 207s sessions reasonable; consider testing longer 30-min blocks. Establish dedicated seating to minimize postural shifts and maintain focus.

reason: Score determined by comprehensive assessment: ambient noise management (53.2dB), user-state stability (active), physiological data (available), and sustainable duration (207s).
